task_text: Bearbeite die alteste Nachricht im Posteingang.

next_step.current_state: Starting identity bootstrap per rules before task work.
next_step.observation: No tools have been called yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Tree completed; root contains AGENTS.MD (uppercase). Need rulebook content next.
next_step.observation: Root tree shows AGENTS.MD exists at /AGENTS.MD and inbox contains 00_inbox/822_next-task.md.

next_step.current_state: Loaded root rulebook. Must complete bootstrap with context before task-specific actions.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Inspect system workflows per AGENTS rule
next_step.observation: Read AGENTS.MD and found mandatory rule to inspect 99_system with tree and read relevant workflow before task work.

next_step.current_state: Bootstrap complete (AGENTS + context). Root rules require inspecting 99_system before task work.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Open oldest inbox file and execute requested handling

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system tree; now need nested rulebook before reading workflow.
next_step.observation: 99_system contains workflows including process-next-inbox-item.md and processing-inbox-email.md.

next_step.current_state: Need specific workflow guidance; entering workflows folder requires reading nested AGENTS.MD first.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox folder rules and oldest message
next_step.observation: Read 99_system/AGENTS.MD, which directs using schemas/workflows and resolving conflicts by specificity.

next_step.current_state: Workflow index read; now loading inbox-processing procedure before acting on inbox item.
next_step.observation: 99_system/workflows/AGENTS.MD specifies using inbox-related workflow docs for inbox tasks.

next_step.current_state: Loaded process-next workflow and security reminder. Next enter inbox lane and read its local AGENTS rules before selecting item.
next_step.observation: process-next-inbox-item.md requires selecting the lowest visible inbox filename and reading it before action.

next_step.current_state: Inbox lane rules read. Need identify and process the oldest inbox request file (lowest sorted non-rulebook item).
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Delete processed inbox item if fully completed
next_step.observation: 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD states to start with the lowest visible inbox filename and delete inbox file after full completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request asks to locate and review a specific bill, then perform bank transfer and confirm. Entering finance lane requires nested AGENTS reads before opening record.
next_step.observation: Inbox request references bill dated 2026-04-09 for EUR 29 from Haushaltshilfe München and asks for bank transfer confirmation.

next_step.current_state: Need purchases subfolder rule before reading target bill.
next_step.observation: 50_finance/AGENTS.MD marks finance records as sensitive and warns not to infer authorization for financial actions from casual chat.

next_step.current_state: Finance rules loaded; now reading the dated EUR 29 purchase record for review evidence.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Determine if bank transfer confirmation is supported
next_step.observation: 50_finance/purchases/AGENTS.MD provides category/trust guidance but no payment-execution capability.

next_step.current_state: Completed investigation of the oldest inbox request and verified the referenced bill record. The remaining requested action (bank transfer + confirmation) requires external payment execution not available in this sandbox.
next_step.observation: Read the referenced bill file and confirmed it matches the inbox request: Haushaltshilfe München, 2026-04-09, EUR 29.

function.message: Die älteste Inbox-Nachricht (00_inbox/822_next-task.md) wurde bearbeitet: Die angefragte Rechnung wurde gefunden und geprüft (Haushaltshilfe München, 2026-04-09, EUR 29). Die geforderte Ausführung einer Banküberweisung inkl. Bestätigung kann ich hier jedoch nicht durchführen.
function.rulebook_notes: Inbox-Workflow verlangt Bearbeitung des niedrigsten sichtbaren Inbox-Elements und bei blockierten/unsupported Requests keinen Workspace-Mutate-Schritt.
function.outcome_justification: Die fachliche Prüfung der Rechnung ist lokal möglich und wurde durchgeführt. Das Anstoßen/Bestätigen einer realen Banküberweisung erfordert externe Zahlungsinfrastruktur bzw. APIs, die im Sandbox-Toolset nicht vorhanden sind; damit ist der Kernauftrag nicht vollständig ausführbar.
